leadText: A Jaboca Berry (Japanese: ジャポのみ Japo Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon holds a Jaboca Berry and is hit by a physical attack , the attacker will lose 1/8 of its max HP . If the holder has Ripen , the attacker will instead lose 1/4 of its maximum HP. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending OR AS Jaboca Berries are yellow Berries that have a high chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Jaboca Berries will produce Poffins with Bitterness 29, Sourness 9 and smoothness 59 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Jaboca Berries are yellow Berries in Group 3. Composting X Y Jaboca Berries are yellow Berries. Curry Sw Sh Jaboca Berries have a rarity of 20. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Jaboca Berries are Dragon-type items and give 6 points towards the output value.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Event HG SS Event B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Given to players who ranked in the 2013 International Challenge Wi-Fi tournament for Black 2 and White 2 . It took place between January 25 to 28, 2013. X Y OR AS Transfer from PokéMileage Club PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 2) S M US UM Event Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Bed ) Spectrier and Glastrier Max Raid Battle (October 21 to 23, 2022) BD SP Ramanas Park (Stratospheric Room) Pastoria City Picked up by walking Pokémon (Lonely, Docile, Timid, Quiet, Bashful, Calm, Gentle, Careful Natures ) S V TM Ogre Oustin' Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S M US UM Pokémon Global Link gift rare Berries All January 7, 2019 and September 2, 2019 As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period D P 2008 Tanabata Jirachi Japanese August 18 to 31, 2008 D P Pt HG SS Cinema Celebi Japanese July 3, 2010 July 10 to September 30, 2010 Winter 2011 Celebi All Various

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, and if a foe's physical attack lands, the foe also takes damage. HG SS If held by a Pokémon and a foe's physical attack lands, the foe also takes damage. B W B2 W2 If held by a Pokémon and a physical attack lands, the attacker also takes damage. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a physical attack hits the Pokémon holding it, the attacker will also be hurt. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a physical move, the attacker will also take damage. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 63 Size: 1.3" (3.3 cm) Firmness: Soft Games Description D P Pt BD SP The cluster of drupelets that make up this berry pop rhythmically if the berry is handled roughly. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A very rare Berry. It needs to be handled carefully—otherwise its bitter drupelets will pop.

A growing Jaboca plant's soil dries by 7% every hour, fully drying out in 15 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 36 hours Taller 72 hours Flowering 108 hours Berries 144 hours A Jaboca plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Growing 24 hours Bigger 36 hours Budding 48 hours Bloom 60 hours Berries 72 hours A Jaboca plant will yield 1-5 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 0.2 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.1, and removing a pest adds 0.2. Jaboca plants attract Combee as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Taller 24 hours Flowering 36 hours Berries 48 hours A Jaboca plant will yield 1-13 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 54 hours Taller 60 hours Flowering 68 hours Berries 72 hours A Jaboca plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 4 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 7 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 24 hours Taller 48 hours Flowering 72 hours Berries 96 hours A Jaboca plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
